case_title: EDITIONS LIMITED GALLERIES VS. FACILITIES MERCHANDISING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDITIONS LIMITED GALLERIES AS TO DEFENDANT FACILITIES MERCHANDISING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JUN-05-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FACILITIES MERCHANDISING, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
